subject: answer command
object: fresh compiled notes for routine answers
claim_text: Fresh compiled notes are the first source for routine answers.

subject: answer command
object: raw source search when compiled coverage is thin
claim_text: When compiled coverage is thin, Atlas falls back to raw source search and requires a verbatim raw quote.

subject: saved answer
claim_text: Saved answers are written only after citation anchors resolve successfully.

subject: preflight checks
object: model calls before bad provenance reaches readers
claim_text: Preflight checks stop a model call before bad provenance reaches a reader.
